sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21519" key="galideu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γᾰλῐδεύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n21519.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a young weasel</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:265" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">265</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
